Multiple-Choice.questionText: What is the sum of 1/4 and 2/4?

feedback.en: Since the denominators are the same, simply add the numerators: 1 + 2 = 3. Keep the denominator: 3/4.
feedback.fil: Dahil pareho ang denominator, idagdag lamang ang mga numerator: 1 + 2 = 3. Panatilihin ang denominator: 3/4.

Multiple-Choice.questionText: Multiply 0.5 by 0.2. What is the product?

feedback.en: Multiplying 5 by 2 gives 10. Since there are two decimal places in total in the factors, place the decimal point two spaces left: 0.10 or 0.1.
feedback.fil: Ang pag-multiply ng 5 sa 2 ay nagbibigay ng 10. Dahil may dalawang decimal places sa kabuuan, ilagay ang decimal point dalawang puwang pakaliwa: 0.10 o 0.1.

feedback.en: Add 5 to both sides to get 3x = 21, then divide by 3 to find x = 7.
feedback.fil: Idagdag ang 5 sa magkabilang panig upang makuha ang 3x = 21, pagkatapos ay i-divide sa 3 upang makuha ang x = 7.

Figures of Speech.questionText: Which of the following sentences is a simile?
options: Her cheeks are like red roses.
The wind whispered in the night.
Figures of Speech.correctAnswer: Her cheeks are like red roses.

feedback.en: A simile compares two things using "like" or "as". Here, cheeks are compared to roses using "like".
feedback.fil: Ang simile ay naghahambing ng dalawang bagay gamit ang "like" o "as" (tulad ng/parang). Dito, inihambing ang pisngi sa rosas gamit ang "like".

Paragraph Comprehension.questionText: Read the text: "Maria worked diligently on her science project every night, verifying every source. When the results were announced, she won first place." What is the main idea of this paragraph?

feedback.en: The paragraph shows how Maria worked hard ("diligently every night") and was rewarded with success ("won first place").
feedback.fil: Ipinapakita ng talata kung paano nagsumikap si Maria ("masigasig gabi-gabi") at nagbunga ito ng tagumpay ("nanalo ng unang puwesto").

Multiple-Choice.questionText: Which word in the sentence "The big dog barked loudly" is an adjective?

feedback.en: An adjective describes a noun or pronoun. In this sentence, "big" describes the noun "dog".
feedback.fil: Ang pang-uri ay naglalarawan ng pangngalan o panghalip. Sa pangungusap na ito, inilalarawan ng "big" ang pangngalang "dog".

Multiple-Choice.questionText: Choose the correct comparative adjective to complete the sentence: "My cat is ______ than your cat."

feedback.en: "Faster" is the comparative form of "fast" and is used when comparing exactly two things, like "my cat" and "your cat".
feedback.fil: Ang "faster" ay ang comparative form ng "fast" at ginagamit kapag naghahambing ng eksaktong dalawang bagay, tulad ng "my cat" at "your cat".

Multiple-Choice.questionText: Which word correctly completes the sentence: "Mount Everest is the ______ mountain in the world."

feedback.en: "Tallest" is the superlative form of "tall" and is used when comparing three or more things, or when describing the upper limit of a quality among many, like all mountains in the world.
feedback.fil: Ang "tallest" ay ang superlative form ng "tall" at ginagamit kapag naghahambing ng tatlo o higit pang bagay, o kapag inilalarawan ang pinakamataas na antas ng isang kalidad sa marami, tulad ng lahat ng bundok sa mundo.

Multiple-Choice.questionText: Read the sentence: "Among the three runners, Sarah was the ______." Which adjective form correctly completes the sentence?

feedback.en: Since the sentence compares "three runners," the superlative form "quickest" is required to describe the one at the upper limit of speed.
feedback.fil: Dahil ang pangungusap ay naghahambing ng "tatlong mananakbo," ang superlative form na "quickest" ang kinakailangan upang ilarawan ang isa na nasa pinakamataas na antas ng bilis.

Multiple-Choice.questionText: In the phrase "She sings beautifully," which word is an adjective?
options: There is no adjective in this phrase.
Multiple-Choice.correctAnswer: There is no adjective in this phrase.

feedback.en: An adjective modifies a noun or pronoun. "Beautifully" is an adverb because it describes how she sings (a verb). There is no word describing a noun or pronoun in this specific phrase.
feedback.fil: Ang pang-uri ay naglalarawan ng pangngalan o panghalip. Ang "beautifully" ay isang pang-abay dahil inilalarawan nito kung paano siya kumanta (isang pandiwa). Walang salitang naglalarawan ng pangngalan o panghalip sa partikular na pariralang ito.

Multiple-Choice.questionText: What does the idiom "burn the midnight oil" mean?
options: To light a candle during a power outage.
To work or study late into the night.
To waste oil or fuel resources.
Multiple-Choice.correctAnswer: To work or study late into the night.

feedback.en: The idiom refers to staying awake late into the night working or studying, historically by the light of an oil lamp.
feedback.fil: Ang idyomang ito ay tumutukoy sa pagpupuyat sa gabi para magtrabaho o mag-aral, na hango sa paggamit ng ilawan noon.
